title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils For Cough
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra essential oils contains flavonoids and saponins as its bioactive constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties that help reduce inflammation in the throat and lungs, making it easier to cough up mucus. Glycyrrhizin, a key component of the oil, has a soothing effect on the respiratory system and helps thin mucus, making it easier to expel. The antiseptic properties of the oil also help combat infections that can cause coughing. By red...
